seo.title: Building Agentic RAG with CrewAI + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build agentic rag with CrewAI + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building Agentic RAG with CrewAI enables multi-agent systems to autonomously plan retrieval queries, fetch from diverse sources, and synthesize attributed responses for complex knowledge tasks. Guardrails are essential to prevent delegation loops, hallucinated tool outputs, task drift, and inconsistent quality across agent roles. Vex integration ensures source faithfulness, hallucination detection, and verification at every step.

architectureOverview.heading: Agentic RAG Architecture with CrewAI
architectureOverview.description:
The Agentic RAG system uses CrewAI to orchestrate specialized agents: a Query Planner decomposes user questions into sub-queries, Retrieval Agents execute parallel searches across vector stores and web sources, a Synthesizer Agent merges results with attribution, and a Validator ensures consistency. Each agent has defined tools for retrieval and caching, with tasks sequenced hierarchically to maintain context flow.

Agents communicate via shared memory and task outputs, enabling iterative refinement. The Query Planner uses reasoning to break down ambiguous queries, while Retrieval Agents handle source-specific logic (e.g., RAG vs. web search). The Synthesizer generates final responses with inline citations, and the Validator cross-checks for contradictions.

This architecture scales to multi-hop reasoning but introduces risks like infinite delegation loops and hallucinated citations when agents misinterpret intermediate results.
architectureOverview.diagram:
User Query
    |
[Query Planner Agent] --> Sub-Queries
    |                           |
    +--[Vector DB Retriever]   +--[Web Search Agent]
           |                           |
        [Chunks w/ metadata]      [Web Results]
           \                         /
            +--[Synthesizer Agent]--+
                       |
                [Validator Agent]
                       |
                 Final Attributed Response

risks.name: Agent delegation loops
risks.description: Query Planner endlessly delegates to Retrievers without converging on sub-queries
risks.mitigation: Vex task callback enforces delegation depth limits and convergence checks

risks.name: Hallucinated tool outputs
risks.description: Retrieval Agents fabricate chunk content or metadata when sources are sparse
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies tool outputs against source faithfulness schemas

risks.name: Task drift in synthesis
risks.description: Synthesizer reinterprets original query, generating unrelated summaries
risks.mitigation: Vex anchors outputs to query intent and source citations

risks.name: Cross-source inconsistency
risks.description: Validator misses contradictions between vector DB and web results
risks.mitigation: Vex cross-verifies factual consistency across all retrieved sources

implementation.title: Query Planner Agent Setup
implementation.description: Define the query decomposition agent with Vex-ready task callbacks
implementation.code:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from vex import Vex

vex = Vex(api_key="your-vex-key")

planner = Agent(
    role="Query Planner",
    goal="Decompose complex questions into precise sub-queries for retrieval",
    backstory="You systematically break down research questions...",
    tools=[query_decomposition_tool],
    verbose=True
)

planning_task = Task(
    description="Decompose: {question} into 3-5 atomic retrieval queries",
    agent=planner,
    context=[user_question],
    callback=lambda output: vex.verify(
        output,
        checks=["query_planning_accuracy", "no_hallucination"]
    )
)

implementation.title: Parallel Retrieval Agents
implementation.description: Deploy multiple retrievers for different sources with shared Vex verification
implementation.code:
retriever_vector = Agent(
    role="Vector DB Retriever",
    goal="Retrieve relevant chunks from knowledge base",
    tools=[vector_retriever_tool],
    verbose=True
)

retriever_web = Agent(
    role="Web Search Retriever",
    goal="Find recent web sources for temporal queries",
    tools=[web_search_tool],
    verbose=True
)

retrieve_task = Task(
    description="Execute these queries: {sub_queries}",
    agent=[retriever_vector, retriever_web],
    parallel=True,
    callback=lambda results: vex.batch_verify(
        results,
        checks=["source_faithfulness", "citation_verification"]
    )
)

implementation.title: Synthesizer with Attribution
implementation.description: Merge results with mandatory source citations and Vex hallucination checks
implementation.code:
synthesizer = Agent(
    role="Knowledge Synthesizer",
    goal="Synthesize comprehensive answer with inline citations",
    backstory="You always attribute claims to specific sources...",
    tools=[citation_formatter],
    verbose=True
)

synth_task = Task(
    description="Synthesize from {retrieval_results} with citations",
    agent=synthesizer,
    context=[planning_task, retrieve_task],
    callback=lambda output: vex.verify(
        output,
        checks=[
            "hallucination_detection",
            "source_faithfulness",
            "cross_source_consistency"
        ]
    )
)

implementation.title: Crew Orchestration with Vex Guardrails
implementation.description: Launch the full crew with comprehensive Vex monitoring
implementation.code:
rag_crew = Crew(
    agents=[planner, retriever_vector, retriever_web, synthesizer],
    tasks=[planning_task, retrieve_task, synth_task],
    verbose=2,
    memory=True,
    max_turns=5  # Prevent delegation loops
)

# Vex monitors entire execution
result = rag_crew.kickoff(inputs={"question": user_query})

vex.log_execution(
    crew_execution=result,
    checks=["full_pipeline_verification"]
)
print(result)

vexIntegration.title: Task-Level Vex Callbacks
vexIntegration.description: Add Vex verification to every CrewAI task preventing failure propagation
vexIntegration.code:
def vex_task_callback(task_output, task_name):
    verification = vex.verify(
        output=task_output,
        task_type=task_name,
        checks=[
            "source_faithfulness",
            "no_hallucination",
            "query_planning_accuracy"
        ],
        risk_profile="high"
    )
    
    if not verification.passed:
        raise ValueError(f"Task {task_name} failed Vex checks: {verification.errors}")
    return task_output

# Apply to all tasks
task.callback = lambda x: vex_task_callback(x, task.description[:50])

vexIntegration.title: Agent Tool Output Validation
vexIntegration.description: Intercept and verify all tool calls before agent processing

vexIntegration.title: Crew Execution Monitoring
vexIntegration.description: Global Vex oversight prevents loops and ensures final output quality
